creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #3)

That's the bad thing about this program, but I find it useful when it comes to creating articles or explaining things in a much more intuitive way. I will use it specifically for creating articles.

A much lighter alternative is asciinema-agg: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269675
